programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bedloe is told by his psychiatrist that he should change his ways and he should love the Cannonball because he having nightmares of the train When Bedloe visits the Shadyrest Hotel Kate is not fooled by the change in him when he says he loves that train They find out Bedloe is planning remove old damaged tracks instead of replacing them to shut down the Cannonball it is up to Kate to stop him

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Ambitious first-time film director Alex Nolan is having trouble eliciting a good and believable performance out of lovely but inexperienced lead actress Leda Bedell Alex decides to use unorthodox methods to coax more credible and effective acting from Leda for the crucial final scene of the horror movie theyre working on together

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Tired and worn out Eric accepts the hospitality of an old man at his home in the woods He becomes attracted to a young woman named Margaret but he fears that he may be responsible for a series of brutal murders in the area

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick tries to stop drinking blood but falls off the wagon and must fight his urges to go on a murderous spree

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A police officer uses a deadly sheriffs badge to seek revenge against a mob boss for the murder of his wife

programme.title: Jaws of Satan
programme.desc: A preacher whose ancestors were cursed by Druids battles Satan who has taken the form of a huge snake

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A couple move into an old house that is supposedly haunted but the wife soon realizes just whos haunting the house Later another couple move into the house and form an unusual relationship with the moving man

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A man murders his beautiful younger wife when she threatens to leave him He then packs her body in a big suitcase and boards a train where he is stalked by an inquisitive detective

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL must track down the secret journal of a retired secret agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear S03E04 Part 2
programme.desc: BJ and the Bear S03E04 Part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed is suffering from feelings of rejection so he moves to the beach to live with a group of outcast beatniks Roger owns the beach property and he wants to evict the whole lot of them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Roger brings home an inventor-friends homemade lie detector and he hooks it up to Wilbur who later hooks it up to Ed

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan tricks Klink into calling forth a bomber for study but it arrives with a complication - a German general familiar with Hogans style

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Fed up with a lack of respect from The Crew and low on self-esteem Parker puts in for a transfer But complications develop when McHale and The Boys work up a scheme to try to make him change his mind

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A new Navy Directive - Which states that all overweight Combat Officers are to be shipped out - Prompts Binghamton to see that McHale puts on an extra 6 pounds - Enough to put him over the limit

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: When the supply Sgt is reluctant to go on vacation Sgt Carter bets him any Knucklehead can take over his job Of course what bigger Knucklehead than Pyle to prove him right

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: In the first of the 3 part sea maneuvers Gomer sneaks a cat aboard a Navy ship unaware there is sensitive Petty Chief Officer who throws all Contraband overboard

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and the Skipper construct a raft and set out to sea to find help Back on the island the remaining castaways are worried about possible headhunters

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways fight over their living arrangements as a violent storm approaches the island

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: George drives into a ditch on the McCoys property breaking their water pipe in the process Grampa claims he posted a warning sign but George claims there was no sign A lawsuit ensues

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grampa manages Georges campaign for town councilman

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Smart is hypnotized to kill the Chief during their nightly game of chess

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The shuttle Liam and Zoor are in crashes over wilderness but survive in safety bubbles The people they meet live off the earth and know nothing of the Taelons However Zoor is injured and missing a Synod meeting on the mother ship

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: In the midst of the post apocalyptic future the team decide to throw a birthday party for Debi Meanwhile the Morthren attempt to locate their malfunctioning seeing-eye device a self-controlled drone which has run amok through the city

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arrested for a murder he did not commit Wills situation looks desperate when his attorney turns out to be a crooked prosecutor with ambitions to rise to the senate Can Alec help prove his friends innocence

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Tressas estranged sister arrives unwittingly bringing danger with her As a class 5 hurricane rages will Alec be able to save his human friends

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Cheerleader Camp
programme.desc: A cheerleader Betsy Russell her boyfriend Leif Garrett colleagues and a team mascot Lucinda Dickey attend a competition spoiled by murder

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: A man claiming to be the Dukes cousin from England Gaylord Duke asks Uncle Jesse for a 30000 advance to pay off the taxes for a piece of land he claims to have inherited But theres more to Gaylords story that he isnt exactly telling

programme.title: Hercules 205
programme.desc: Hercules 205

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Sandoval has a mole attempting to gain information about Liam - particularly concerning his commitment to the Taelons When a Taelon and protector are killed in a portal that malfunctions Liam is suspicious that it was intentional

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone pursues a killer who shot an officer about to retire in three days; guests Tim OConnor Eileen Heckart

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A cocky sleazy and horny late night talk radio host brings in a sexy female guest who claims the aliens gave her the solution to evil in the world - a monster that eats bad people who agree to it He laughs it off at first

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon are working day watch and must go to the hospital when a veteran police officer and his young partner are seriously wounded in a liquor store holdup where they deal with very different reactions of the wives

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The detectives investigate an especially creepy college freshman suspected of the sniper-rifle deaths of two people for no apparent reason other than the sport of killing

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A habitually lying little girl falsely accuses Kimble of chasing her through the woods and it puts his life in greater danger

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes to the aid of a woman but finds she has double-crossed him He tracks her down finding her a owner of a herd of cattle being driven to Kansas He joins drive as a hand but his expertise may bring him a big payday

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.desc: Falling Star

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Venger enslaved a gnome village with a powerful spell Only a gnome wizard Lukian can break the spell but Venger had trapped Lukian in a most unusual prison

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The beautiful MAD agent Labella is disrupting the peaceful country of Pianostan Inspector Gadget stops her before she causes a revolution Safety Tip Dont eat food that looks old or bad; prevent food poisoning

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: The famous Emerald Duck is stolen from the temple of the Sungod Inspector Gadget exposed the criminal and restores order

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Both sides turn to the deranged but brilliant Dr Braxis first to destroy the Roguestar and then to save it

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Miniaturized to repair a computer the Guardians must defend themselves against aggressive cleaner drones as well as a miniaturized Renegade sabotage team

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Oton leads the Time Creatures from the future on a mission to eliminate the HerculoidsThe Viking-like Raider Apes led by Gotron raid a village looking for gold Zandor comes to the rescue

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Konar is siphoning the atmosphere Zandor follows the wind to find him who brings out the ZorbotsVolton and the Electrode Men fly their spaceship into a volcano where they aim to take over the world

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: In search of a message from Audric Jayce lands on a planet protected by telepathic plants which keep the planet concealed Saw Boss makes a deal with a wicket wizard who has put a sleeping spell on the princess who controls the plants

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: By using a lock of Audrics hair Saw Boss creates a clone which tricks Jayce into a trap Gillian suspects the truth and convinces Jayce to leave the root behind as a precaution Jayce is captured and a clone of Jayce is sent back for the root
